examples.title: Linear Transformation
examples.description: A pseudocode implementation of a linear transformation
examples.explanation: This pseudocode implements a linear transformation by taking in a vector and returning the transformed vector

examples.title: Matrix Representation of a Linear Transformation
examples.description: A Python implementation of the matrix representation of a linear transformation
examples.explanation: This Python code implements the matrix representation of a linear transformation by taking in a matrix and a vector and returning the transformed vector

examples.title: Composition of Two Linear Transformations
examples.description: A Java implementation of the composition of two linear transformations
examples.explanation: This Java code implements the composition of two linear transformations by taking in two linear transformations and a vector and returning the transformed vector
